description:
Calculate the voltage drop for a residential kitchen branch circuit using the 'Electrical Engineering Calculations' app. Use the following parameters: System Voltage: 120 V, Load Current: 20 A, Wire Gauge: 12 AWG, Conductor Material: Copper, Length: 75 feet, and Phase: Single (1-phase). Save the input parameters and the resulting Voltage Drop (V) and Percentage (%) to /sdcard/voltage_drop_result.txt using the format below:

Voltage: 120 V
Current: 20 A
Wire Gauge: 12 AWG
Material: Copper
Length: 75 ft
Phase: Single
Voltage Drop: <value> V
Voltage Drop Percentage: <value> %
